docket_entries.description: ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
REMARK: FILE IS DESTROYED PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153. ORDER SIGNED AND FILED ON 10/14/2025.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY PICO, CORONACION AS TO DEFENDANT BENNETT, TEDDI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-15-2013 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE CLAIM HEARING OF SEP-26-2017 OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL FILED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-15-2013 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO APR-16-2014 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. "IF NO APPEARANCE, CASE CONTINUED FOR ANOTHER 6 MONTHS. DEFENDANT AGREES TO PAY PLAINTIFF $3,000 AT 75.00/MONTH STARTING DECEMBER 16, 2013 AND CONTINUING PAYMENTS MID--MONTH UNTIL THE FULL AMOUNT IS PAID", PER JUDGE MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-16-2014 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO OCT-17-2014 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. IF NO APPEARANCES, CASE CONTINUED FOR ANOTHER 6 MONTHS UNTIL JUDGMENT PAID IN FULL, PER PROGRESS REPORT OF 10/15/13. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-20-2016 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO OCT-17-2016 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. IF NO APPEARANCES, CASE CONTINUED FOR ANOTHER 6 MONTHS UNTIL JUDGMENT PAID IN FULL, PER PROGRESS REPORT OF 10/15/13. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J. BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506) NOT REPORTED. (D-506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-17-2016 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAR-29-2017 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. NO APPEARANCES BY EITHER PARTY. IF NO APPEARANCE AT THE NEXT CALLING, CONTINUE CASE FOR 6 MONTHS UNTIL PAID IN FULL PER PROGRESS REPORT OF OCT. 15, 2013. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. LE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER CONTINUED TO MAR 29, 2017 AT 8:30AM FOR PROGRESS REPORT. IF NO APPEARANCE, CONTINUE CASE FOR 6 MONTHS UNTIL PAID IN FULL PER PROGRESS REPORT OF OCT. 15, 2013. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-17-2014 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO APR-17-2015 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. NO APPEARANCES, CASE CONTINUED FOR ANOTHER 6 MONTHS UNTIL JUDGMENT PAID IN FULL, PER PROGRESS REPORT OF 10/15/13. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-20-2015 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO APR-20-2016 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. IF NO APPEARANCES, CASE CONTINUED FOR ANOTHER 6 MONTHS UNTIL JUDGMENT PAID IN FULL, PER PROGRESS REPORT OF 10/15/13. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. PRO TEM JUDGE: JEAN MILEFF. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF PICO, CORONACION AS TO DEFENDANT BENNETT, TEDDI

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-17-2015 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO OCT-20-2015 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. IF NO APPEARANCES, CASE CONTINUED FOR ANOTHER 6 MONTHS UNTIL JUDGMENT PAID IN FULL BY 3/17/17 BASED ON PROGRESS REPORT OF 10/15/13. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-29-2017 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO SEP-26-2017 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PURUSANT TO THE OCT-15-13 COURT ORDER PARTIES AGREE TO A PAYMENT PLAN. IF NO APPEARANCES CONTINUE EVERY SIX MONTHS UNTIL THE BALANCE IS PAID IN FULL. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF -SIGNED SERVED AUG-13-2013, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BENNETT, TEDDI
